reviews.comment:
Bastante provisto, buena atención. Si llegas con poco combustible a Puerto Pirámides, podes cargar tranquilamente...

(Translated by Google)
Well-stocked, good service. If you arrive in Puerto Pirámides with low fuel, you can easily fill up...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNHBieW5nRRAB

reviews.comment: You have to consume to use the bathroom, A/C could be useful in hot days also. Everything is pretty expensive except for warm water for mate. If you're lucky you can use a car space with shadow, a rare privilege in this town.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtb3U2REZREAE
